notes: Nassau County Land Records Viewer is a web search page only — no ArcGIS REST endpoint or API discovered. Manual lookups only.
Allegheny County real estate portal — interactive web map with no visible ArcGIS REST endpoint. Requires browser interaction. Not a machine-readable API.
Bronx is covered by the nyc-ny-violations connector (all 5 NYC boroughs under one Socrata endpoint). No separate county endpoint exists.
Queens covered by nyc-ny-violations. NYC operates as one city with one open data portal.
Manhattan (New York County) covered by nyc-ny-violations.
Santa Barbara County GIS requires ArcGIS Online organizational login to access parcel layers. Not publicly queryable without authentication.
DuPage County parcel viewer is an interactive web app. No REST API endpoint discovered. Parcel search requires form submission.
Fresno County assessor property search is a web form with CAPTCHA. No ArcGIS REST API discovered.
Middlesex County NJ has no open data portal discovered. County assessor data is behind a paywall (third-party vendor).
Multnomah County property search is a web form. No ArcGIS REST endpoint discovered for public query. Portland Maps offers some data but requires interactive use.
